name: GlobalConnect AS8896
notes:
GlobalConnect operates three main networks covering much of Northern Europe: AS12552, AS31027, and AS2116, and act as a regional Tier 1 in the Nordics.

AS12552, AS31027, and AS2116 are fully interconnected and exchange peering traffic between the networks.

All three networks are now gradually being unified under AS6797, the future primary peering and transit ASN for GlobalConnect.

Xfiber AS8896 network, is part of GlobalConnect. Network is moved behind AS12552 and customers are slowly being moved to AS12552 and AS2116.
